basic_details.job_title: CSIR CEERI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Technical Officer and Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: The CSIR-Central Electronics Engineering Research Institute (CSIR CEERI) Technical Officer and Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 21-05-2026 on the official website ceeri.res.in. A total of 22 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR CEERI Technical Officer and Technician 2026 Recruitment.

age_limit.age_details: Minimum age is 18 years. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBDs.
age_limit.details: Minimum age is 18 years as on the last date for submission of online application. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBDs.

qualification.details: Technical Officer (TO-1): B.E./ B.Tech. or equivalent in Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Electronics and Communication Engineering & Electronics Engineering with minimum 55% marks. OR M. Sc. or equivalent in Physics/ Electronics/ Applied Electronics with minimum 55% marks. Technical Officer (TO-2): B.E./B.Tech./ M.Sc or equivalent in Computer Science with minimum 55% marks. OR MCA* with minimum 55% marks. Technician (1) (TECH-1): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Electronics Mechanic. OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Electronics Mechanic. OR 3 years of work experience in Electronics Mechanic. Technician (1) (TECH-2): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. OR 3 years of work experience in Electrician/Wiremen/Electrical Fitter. Technician (1) (TECH-3): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Mason (Building Constructor). OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Mason (Building Constructor). OR 3 years of work experience in Mason (Building Constructor). Technician (1) (TECH-4): Secondary School Certificate (SSC)/ 10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects, with minimum 55% marks and ITI certificate or National/ State trade certificate in Draughtsman (Civil). OR 2 years full time experience as an apprentice trainee in Draughtsman (Civil). OR 3 years of work experience in Draughtsman (Civil).

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 7 (₹89,268/- Approx.) for Technical Officer and Pay Level-2 (₹19,900-₹63,200) for Technician.
salary_details.details: Technical Officer: Pay Level 7 (₹89,268/- Approx.) Technician (1): Pay Level-2 (₹19,900-₹63,200)

selection_process: Screening based on online applications Trade Test/ Written Test (Paper-I
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CEERI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CEERI to complete the application.
